Project: PR Repair Pipeline
Purpose: Local-first, repo-aware PR repair microservice for L9-governed repositories.

Core behaviors:
- ingest findings from CodeRabbit, Codecov, GitHub checks, and comments
- normalize findings into canonical typed records
- dedupe by stable fingerprint
- classify against repo governance, tiers, and path policy
- plan deterministic repairs
- execute exact-match patch instructions only
- verify with repo contract
- emit review-only learning recommendations

Critical constraints:
- tool findings outrank comments
- protected paths require escalation
- write ceiling must be enforced
- no direct AGENT.md mutation
- no direct validator mutation
- no force push
- rollback on verification failure

Important commands:
- make pr-fix-dry
- make pr-fix-propose
- make pr-fix
- make pr-fix-verify
- make pr-fix-learn
